observatory_room.role_en: The hub where Maya explains the question for the night and where every route begins.
observatory_room.role_zh: 玛雅说明今晚问题、所有行动路线开始的基地大厅。

mission_board.role_en: Defines the scientific question and the success condition. It recommends equipment but never installs it for you.
mission_board.role_zh: 说明科学问题和成功条件，只推荐设备，不会替玩家安装。

parts_cabinet.role_en: Turns the mission requirement into a deliberate equipment choice.
parts_cabinet.role_zh: 把任务需求转化为玩家主动做出的设备选择。

assembly_table.role_en: Turns selected parts into a working optical system and exposes compatibility problems.
assembly_table.role_zh: 把选中的零件变成可工作的光学系统，并检查兼容性。

tube_blueprint.role_en: Explains the internal light path before the completed tube returns to the main assembly.
tube_blueprint.role_zh: 先解释镜筒内部光路，再把完整镜筒送回主装配。

collimation_bench.role_en: Aligns the mirrors so the reflector's theoretical resolution becomes visible in the image.
collimation_bench.role_zh: 校准镜面光轴，让反射镜的理论分辨率真正出现在画面中。

observation_pad.role_en: Tests the prediction in the real sky through aiming, focusing, tracking and identification.
observation_pad.role_zh: 通过瞄准、调焦、追踪和辨认，在真实天空中检验前面的判断。

site_map.role_en: Changes location only when the same target cannot be observed comfortably from the current horizon.
site_map.role_zh: 只有当前地点无法舒适观测同一目标时，才负责更换观测地点。

club_logbook.role_en: Records evidence and comparisons; it does not choose the next mission.
club_logbook.role_zh: 记录证据和对比结果，不负责选择下一项任务。

space_console.role_en: Replaces the ground telescope when the observation depends on a remote space platform.
space_console.role_zh: 当观测依赖远程空间平台时，取代地面观测台成为操作入口。

radio_console.role_en: Turns an invisible radio signal into tunable, measurable data.
radio_console.role_zh: 把肉眼看不见的射电信号转化成可以调谐和测量的数据。

chapters.title_zh: 初见星光：建立观测基线
chapters.cause_en: Before comparing telescopes, we need to learn what unaided eyes can and cannot reveal.
chapters.cause_zh: 在比较望远镜之前，必须先知道肉眼能看见什么、又会遗漏什么。
chapters.proof_en: Brightness makes an object visible, but aperture and magnification reveal structure.
chapters.proof_zh: 亮度决定能否看见，口径和倍率才决定能否看清结构。

chapters.cause_en: The naked-eye baseline showed missing detail, so we build a stable lens telescope and learn its controls one at a time.
chapters.cause_zh: 肉眼基线暴露了细节不足，因此先组装稳定的透镜望远镜，并逐项学习它的控制。
chapters.proof_en: A telescope only helps when its parts, focus, field of view and mount work as one system.
chapters.proof_zh: 只有零件、焦点、视场和支架作为一个系统协同工作，望远镜才真正有用。

chapters.cause_en: The instrument now works; the next errors come from darkness, clouds, atmosphere, drift and the observer.
chapters.cause_zh: 仪器已经能工作，接下来的误差来自暗适应、云层、大气、漂移和观察者自身。
chapters.proof_en: Good observing is active correction, not simply owning better optics.
chapters.proof_zh: 好的观测来自持续修正，而不是只拥有更好的光学零件。

chapters.cause_en: Maya stops isolating one control at a time so the player must combine the complete workflow.
chapters.cause_zh: 玛雅不再一次只考一个操作，玩家必须把完整观测流程组合起来。
chapters.proof_en: The player can plan, assemble, aim, focus, track and judge evidence without step-by-step rescue.
chapters.proof_zh: 玩家能够独立规划、组装、瞄准、调焦、追踪并判断证据。

chapters.cause_en: A bright, distant star exposes colored fringes that better focusing cannot remove.
chapters.cause_zh: 明亮而遥远的恒星暴露出无法靠继续调焦消除的彩色边缘。
chapters.proof_en: Some image defects belong to the optical design, so the correct response is a different light path.
chapters.proof_zh: 有些像差来自光学结构本身，正确答案不是继续拧旋钮，而是更换光路。

chapters.title_zh: 牛顿式：用反射取代折射
chapters.cause_en: Mirrors bring every visible color to the same focus, but their open light path introduces collimation.
chapters.cause_zh: 镜面能让可见光各颜色落在同一焦点，却也让开放光路带来准直要求。
chapters.proof_en: The reflector removes lens color fringing only when its primary, secondary and focuser share one optical axis.
chapters.proof_zh: 只有主镜、副镜和调焦器共用一条光轴，反射镜才能兑现没有透镜色差的优势。

chapters.title_zh: 多布森式：用自动化换取大口径
chapters.cause_en: The Newtonian light path works, so a simple rocker mount lets us spend more of the design on a larger mirror.
chapters.cause_zh: 牛顿光路已经成立，简单的摇臂底座让更多成本可以用于更大的主镜。
chapters.proof_en: Large aperture reveals fainter targets, while manual nudging makes tracking an observer skill.
chapters.proof_zh: 大口径揭示更暗弱的目标，而手动推镜让追踪成为观察者必须掌握的技能。

chapters.title_en: Cassegrain: Fold Distance into a Compact Tube
chapters.title_zh: 卡塞格林式：把长焦距折进短镜筒
chapters.cause_en: Deep-sky aperture is not the answer to every target; small planetary detail needs a long effective focal length and precise pointing.
chapters.cause_zh: 大口径深空观测并非万能，小尺度行星细节需要更长的有效焦距和更精确的指向。
chapters.proof_en: A folded light path makes high magnification practical, but narrows the field and raises the cost of every aiming error.
chapters.proof_zh: 折叠光路让高倍率更实用，却缩小视场并放大每一次瞄准误差。

chapters.title_en: Beyond the Ground and Visible Light
chapters.cause_en: Ground telescopes are limited by atmosphere and visible wavelengths, so Maya moves the experiment to a cold infrared observatory in space.
chapters.cause_zh: 地面望远镜受大气和可见光波段限制，因此玛雅把实验转移到太空中的低温红外观测站。
chapters.proof_en: Location and wavelength can reveal information that no increase in visible-light magnification can recover.
chapters.proof_zh: 改变位置和波段，能揭示单纯提高可见光倍率永远无法恢复的信息。

chapters.title_en: FAST: When Data Becomes the Image
chapters.cause_en: Infrared expanded the spectrum; radio astronomy completes the lesson by replacing the eyepiece image with a measurable signal.
chapters.cause_zh: 红外观测扩展了光谱，射电天文则进一步用可测量信号取代目镜图像。
chapters.proof_en: Astronomy is not defined by what the eye sees, but by repeatable evidence collected with the right instrument.
chapters.proof_zh: 天文学不由眼睛看见什么定义，而由正确仪器收集到的可重复证据定义。

intro.action_en: Use the central Observation Pad to establish a naked-eye baseline.
intro.action_zh: 前往中央观测台，建立肉眼观测基线。

first_tube_subassembly.action_en: Build the internal optical path first, then return the completed tube to the main blueprint.
first_tube_subassembly.action_zh: 先完成内部光路，再把完整镜筒送回主蓝图。

first_collimation.action_en: Align the primary, secondary and focuser before asking the reflector for a sharp image.
first_collimation.action_zh: 先让主镜、副镜和调焦器共轴，再要求反射镜给出清晰图像。

first_below_horizon.action_en: Keep the same target and choose a site where it has already risen.
first_below_horizon.action_zh: 保留同一目标，选择一个它已经升起的观测地点。
